allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'], x['type']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'], x['type']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" echo "---" curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/obra/superpowers/contents/skills")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'], x['type']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" echo "---")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('full_name', d.get\('message','not found'\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'], x['type']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" echo "---" curl -s "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/obra/superpowers-marketplace/main/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.keys\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d[0].get\('Config',{}\); print\('Cmd:', c.get\('Cmd'\)\); print\('Entrypoint:', c.get\('Entrypoint'\)\); print\('ExposedPorts:', list\(c.get\('ExposedPorts',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
